name: Security Check on Auth Files
description: When an auth-related file is edited, prompt the agent to review for common security issues.

then.prompt: An authentication or security-related file was just edited. Please review the changes for: (1) hardcoded secrets or credentials, (2) missing input validation, (3) insecure token handling, (4) missing rate limiting on sensitive endpoints, (5) any deviation from the security guidelines in .kiro/steering/project.md.
